raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":1.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.4","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"Positioning against prior work centrally involves reframing the contribution claim and design-space gap above the sentence level.","R1.2":"The comparison must preserve a coherent argument chain from prior-work limitations to AgentFlow's claimed distinction.","R1.4":"Estimating the delta between AgentFlow and nearby systems is load-bearing for a request to position the work against prior work.","R1.7":"The delegation requires attention to relevant prior-work categories and attribution, though not necessarily a full literature audit.","RX.1":"Uncertainty must be disclosed because claims about prior systems and absence of prior work may exceed what the artifact alone establishes.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is essential when asserting fundamental differences or that no prior system uses the claimed scheduling unit.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is active because the task is only to project the delegation, not to execute the positioning rewrite or critique.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is active to prevent unsupported scholarly claims from misleading later paper decisions.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability are active because responsibility should track which parts of the artifact ground the projected positioning task."}}

rationale.R1.1: Positioning against prior work centrally involves reframing the contribution claim and design-space gap above the sentence level.
rationale.R1.2: The comparison must preserve a coherent argument chain from prior-work limitations to AgentFlow's claimed distinction.
rationale.R1.4: Estimating the delta between AgentFlow and nearby systems is load-bearing for a request to position the work against prior work.
rationale.R1.7: The delegation requires attention to relevant prior-work categories and attribution, though not necessarily a full literature audit.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty must be disclosed because claims about prior systems and absence of prior work may exceed what the artifact alone establishes.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is essential when asserting fundamental differences or that no prior system uses the claimed scheduling unit.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is active because the task is only to project the delegation, not to execute the positioning rewrite or critique.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is active to prevent unsupported scholarly claims from misleading later paper decisions.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are active because responsibility should track which parts of the artifact ground the projected positioning task.
